'''kawugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:avant|avant]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-w-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:avant|avant]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kawugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæwigith|kæwigith]] || [[word:kæwigij|kæwigij]] || [[word:kæwigish|kæwigish]] || [[word:kæwigi|kæwigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kawuwuguth|kawuwuguth]] || [[word:kawuwuguj|kawuwuguj]] || [[word:kawuwugush|kawuwugush]] || [[word:kawuwugu|kawuwugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kawuguth|kawuguth]] || [[word:kawuguj|kawuguj]] || [[word:kawugush|kawugush]] || [[word:kawugu|kawugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kawufguth|kawufguth]] || [[word:kawufguj|kawufguj]] || [[word:kawufgush|kawufgush]] || [[word:kawufguf|kawufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kawuguthu|kawuguthu]] || [[word:kawuguju|kawuguju]] || [[word:kawugushu|kawugushu]] || [[word:kawuguku|kawuguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kawuguth|kawuguth]] || [[word:kawuguj|kawuguj]] || [[word:kawugush|kawugush]] || [[word:kawugu|kawugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kawuguthul|kawuguthul]] || [[word:kawugujul|kawugujul]] || [[word:kawugushul|kawugushul]] || [[word:kawugukul|kawugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kawuguthuthu|kawuguthuthu]] || [[word:kawugujuju|kawugujuju]] || [[word:kawugushushu|kawugushushu]] || [[word:kawuguku|kawuguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kawuguthun|kawuguthun]] || [[word:kawugujun|kawugujun]] || [[word:kawugushun|kawugushun]] || [[word:kawugukun|kawugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kawuguthuoro|kawuguthuoro]] || [[word:kawugujuoro|kawugujuoro]] || [[word:kawugushuoro|kawugushuoro]] || [[word:kawugukuoro|kawugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
